title: The Power Behind the Prompt: AI and the Energy Crisis
subtitle: How the rapid expansion of AI data centers is reshaping global energy demands
description: This series explores the intersection of high-performance computing and electrical grids. Readers will gain insight into the environmental, economic, and geopolitical implications of the AI boom — from the hidden cost of a single search query to the future of nuclear power and grid modernization.

articles.label: Part 1
articles.note: Why AI models require so much electricity — and how this compares to traditional computing.

articles.label: Part 2
articles.note: The tension between Big Tech's sustainability pledges and the reality of power grid capacity.

articles.label: Part 3
articles.note: What happens when a region's grid reaches its limit — and which areas have already said no.

articles.label: Part 4
articles.note: The environmental and economic costs — carbon emissions, rising electricity bills, and community impacts.

articles.label: Part 5
articles.note: Nuclear power, efficiency gains, and policy options: what could actually solve the problem.
